---
title: "Week 13"
date: 04-27-26
description: |
  We will begin hypothesis testing.
editor: source
draft: false
---

## Resources

| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Tuesday    | [Slides](../lectures/13a.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/13a_annotated.pdf) | [Video](https://youtu.be/lGCLcUW6ekQ) |
| Thursday | [Slides](../lectures/13b.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/13b_annotated.pdf) | [Video](https://youtu.be/yCP9USxyuVk) |
